summary: Tasks & Requests page restructure - All features tested and verified. Backend: 28/28 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - My Tasks/All Tasks tabs, 6 metric cards each, department multi-select filter, List/Board views, New Task creation, search filter, clear button.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and integrations verified

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Playwright_Task during frontend testing - will be cleaned up by test fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tasks & Requests page restructure fully tested. Key features: 1) Primary tabs: 'My Tasks' (default) and 'All Tasks' with data-testid='tab-my-tasks' and 'tab-all-tasks'. 2) My Tasks shows 6 personal metrics: Total, Assigned to Me, Created by Me, In Progress, Overdue, High Priority (data-testid='my-stat-*'). 3) All Tasks shows 6 department metrics: Total, Open, In Progress, In Review, Overdue, Closed (data-testid='all-stat-*'). 4) Department multi-select filter (data-testid='task-dept-multi-filter') defaults to user's departments (Sales, Marketing for CEO). 5) Backend supports view=mine for combined assigned+created tasks and comma-separated department_id for multi-department filtering. 6) List and Board sub-views work under both tabs. 7) Milestones and Labels tabs only visible under All Tasks. 8) New Task button (data-testid='new-task-btn') creates tasks successfully.

Frontend_UI_Tests.My_Tasks_6_metric_cards: PASSED - Total, Assigned to Me, Created by Me, In Progress, Overdue, High Priority
Frontend_UI_Tests.My_Tasks_metrics_show_correct_counts: PASSED - Total: 31, Assigned to Me: 2, Created by Me: 14, In Progress: 2, Overdue: 13, High Priority: 2
